item.title: Labor Harmony, Ebola Clear, Body Found
item.ns0:title: Union Leaders Divided Over Ethics of Publicly Supporting Political Parties During Labor Week — Tuesday, June 2nd, 2026
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, tensions rise during Labor Week as union leaders debate the ethics of political endorsements while government officials address ongoing industrial concerns. We have the latest results from a recent Ebola monitoring situation and a full report on a tragic homicide that has rocked a quiet western neighborhood. Our team also follows the chilling new developments in the disappearance of an American woman in Abaco and a significant court victory for a man injured in police custody. Join us for these stories, plus a major cash seizure investigation and your complete tropical weather outlook.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.

Tonight on Our News, tensions rise during Labor Week as union leaders debate the ethics of political endorsements while government officials address ongoing industrial concerns. We have the latest results from a recent Ebola monitoring situation and a full report on a tragic homicide that has rocked a quiet western neighborhood. Our team also follows the chilling new developments in the disappearance of an American woman in Abaco and a significant court victory for a man injured in police custody. Join us for these stories, plus a major cash seizure investigation and your complete tropical weather outlook.

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, tensions rise during Labor Week as union leaders debate the ethics of political endorsements while government officials address ongoing industrial concerns. We have the latest results from a recent Ebola monitoring situation and a full report on a tragic homicide that has rocked a quiet western neighborhood. Our team also follows the chilling new developments in the disappearance of an American woman in Abaco and a significant court victory for a man injured in police custody. Join us for these stories, plus a major cash seizure investigation and your complete tropical weather outlook.

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
